day name: The Synaxis of the Holy Archangel Gabriel; Holy venerable Stephen the Sabbaite; Our father among the saints Julian, Bishop of Kenomane
title: the Sabbaite
, Bishop of Kenomane
name: Gabriel
Stephen
Julian
troparia: (Tone 4) O prince of the heavenly hosts,* we, though unworthy, beg you* to encircle us through your prayers* under the shelter of the wings of your spiritual glory.* Guard us as we come to you and sincerely cry:* "Deliver us from dangers,** O prince of the powers on high!"
kontakia: (Tone 2) O prince of God’s hosts, minister of divine glory,* leader of angels and guide of men,* pray for our welfare and for great mercy,* O prince of the incorporeal powers.
